mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( user_id, ordered_name, ordered_zip_code, ordered_address, total_price )VALUES ( #{userId}, #{orderedName}, #{orderedZipCode}, #{orderedAddress}, #{totalPrice} )
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS order_id, o.user_id, o.ordered_name, o.ordered_zip_code, o.ordered_address, o.total_price, o.ordered_at, d.id AS detail_id, d.order_id, d.ordered_image, d.ordered_name AS detail_ordered_name, d.ordered_price, d.quantity FROM ( SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ordered_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) AS o LEFT JOIN order_detail AS d ON o.id = d.order_id ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC

SELECT o.id AS order_id, o.user_id, o.ordered_name, o.ordered_zip_code, o.ordered_address, o.total_price, o.ordered_at, d.id AS detail_id, d.order_id, d.ordered_image, d.ordered_name AS detail_ordered_name, d.ordered_price, d.quantity FROM ( SELECT * FROM `order`
ordered_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR DATE_FORMAT(ordered_at, '%Y/%m/%d') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY ordered_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) AS o LEFT JOIN order_detail AS d ON o.id = d.order_id ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order`
ordered_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR DATE_FORMAT(ordered_at, '%Y/%m/%d') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
